Cloak of Leaves  
 


Slot: BACK
AC: 5
AGI: +7 HP: +5
WT: 2.0 Size: LARGE
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Slot: BACK
AC: 5
AGI: +7 HP: +5
WT: 2.0 Size: LARGE
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

South Karana
NPC Name
Grizzleknot

Zone Name
South Karana


Uploaded September 29th, 2019 by Drewinette
Send a correction
Post Comment
Got one last night!
QuoteReply
# May 11 2002 at 1:12 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759037144
4 posts
A ranger in my group wanted the staff, so he convinced me to help him track Grizzlenot and kill him for him (he had just died in Split Paw and was waiting for a rez). Lucky he was there to heal me because I was pretty weak from the gnolls already. Anyway, I finally killed him. The ranger let me loot first and I got the cloack. The funny part was that he didn't even drop the staff that the ragner was looking for! Haha!

Anyway, I have opted to wear this instead of my banded cloak. I only lost 1 AC point and the +7 AGI helps since it seems I'm always encumbered.

Cheers,
Royo

29 lvl Pali, Vazzelle server.
▲ Page top
hide and seek
QuoteReply
# Mar 14 2002 at 2:05 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591773267619
2 posts
My druid played hide and seek with two baby giants in SK yesterday. After a half hour of weird hijinx they gave each of us who played with them a cloak of leaves. At first I thought it was the mega no drop one...dang this one isn't as good as my ice bear...will give to my monk, but a bit heavy.
▲ Page top
Strange Incident
QuoteReply
# Mar 07 2002 at 12:52 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247662104
1 post
Just yesterday I was in Butcherblock Mnts. helping one of my friends lvl up her druid. While there, we heard someone shout that the Undead Queen, the Undead Bishop and the Undead Rook where standing outside the gates of Kaladim. We ran over to see, and sure enough she was there. Myself and a 30 pally or cleric, can't recall, began to fight her. We ended up chasing her and the other 2 back to the chess board where we finished her off. She dropped the enameled bp and the cloak of leaves. My question is, could it be some kind of glitch that it dropped off her? If anyone knows please let me know.
▲ Page top
Pure Luck
QuoteReply
# Jun 06 2001 at 4:17 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Gah i was camping the top of the bird house while i waited for a friend and i hear that annoying crawling sound treants make so my friend gets there and we jump down and look for a treant all we find is a damn named Treant so we killed it just cuz it was tehr and it dropped the cloak lol soon as i said something in OOC every monk in the zone started bugging me for it now THAT is pure luck
▲ Page top
My lucky Day
QuoteReply
# May 28 2001 at 2:10 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
So I had spent some time in South Karana, and according to what everyone on the boards and in the game said I'd be lucky to even find Griz. Well, pretty soon someone shouts out that he's wandering around, so I run and find the guy and start following him. I figure I'll just use my silver tongue to talk whatever druid or whoever wants to kill him outta the bark he's gonna drop for my shammy totemic armor. (which, according to these sites, blows chunks compared to other armor, but I'm still wearing banded, so I could care less)

Anyways, /who all shaman, I find that one of my higher level buddies is there, and instead I start giving him locations to Griz. He ambushes him at the Aviak town with only two other party members. Now my friend was 28 shammy, I'm 22, his buddies were both blue to me, and the four of us waxed Griz in no time. So my buddy loots the bark, and I've spent a lot of time for nothing-- or so I think.

THen he turns around and gives me what (I presume) he had just looted from ol' griz, the CLOAK OF LEAVES, AC5, AGI7 and HP5!!! Not bad payment for a little tracking, I'd say...
So next I go and look at how the Cloak of Leaves compares with the Totemic Cloak. AC10, STA5. Well, gorsh, I think to myself, to get the Totemic Cloak I gotta haul my pasty white Barbie **** to the Ocean, camp the Isle Gobby chief and his friends, and hope for an uncommon driftwood pipe NO DROP?!??! Then buy the stinkin dufrenite gem for an arm and a leg, and then get this lousy piece totemic? No thanks...

I guess the whole point (sorry about the length) is that for all the shammys who say that hunting Griz is not worth your time becuase the totemic armor isn't as good as say... bloodstained, which I cant afford anyways... I say he is, becuase there is an off chance he's gonna drop this sweeeeet piece of stylin' capewear. So even though the totemic mail might not be worth the time, this cape darn sure is.

All in all, it was a good night with some nice rewards for me.
▲ Page top
RE: My lucky Day
QuoteReply
# Aug 20 2001 at 2:12 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591753943687
6 posts
The Totemic Cloak is one of the highest AC items for level obtainable in the game. The extra stamina is worth much more than than the Cloak of Leaves stats for the extra hps alone.

As a high level shaman, I still use the Totemic Cloak occasionally. If your shaman can't even be bothered making the effort to get the first set of racial armor? Ahhh... good grief.
▲ Page top
Off to find him
QuoteReply
# May 13 2001 at 6:51 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I wanna kill this dude. he drops this nice cloak for my monk. no, the weight isn't too bad. any one item above wt. 2 or 3 (except for my helm of rile, oh it's just too good :P) is too heavy for a monk.
▲ Page top
some useful information
QuoteReply
# May 01 2001 at 3:09 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1606090711584
128 posts
I spotted Grizzleknot walking (however a treant walks) in SK just a few moments north of the Aviak village. he does cast druid spells and is not immune to root spells. root , snare , dot, nuke , best way you can get him.

Now I was worried about Faction hits, as a druid of Tunare, howeve my faction with QRGprotected animals and JaggedpineTreefolk went up instead of down. so no worries there druids.

Also please do not brag here. Don't Make it that kind of Mental gratification Site. give useful information please Dragnarsh.
▲ Page top

__DEL__1592251831970
105 posts
Where does it say he can't brag here? No worse than what other's do on this site.

QuoteReply
# Mar 18 2001 at 10:19 AM Rating: Default

Rare Mob - Had to track him, he also drops the component for totemic armor BP - heh killed him last night, right after we killed quillmane - no big deal, all in a nights work. Well, off to EC to sell the cloak.

Dragnarsh, 28th Druid, Quellious
